description: Tools for browsing, checking availability, and booking verified local tour guides in Cambodia. The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these to help users find a guide who speaks their language and matches their interests.

tools.name: list_guides
tools.description: Browse and filter verified tour guides in Cambodia. Use when the user wants a local guide, needs someone who speaks a specific language (EN/ZH/KM), or has a specialty preference (Temples, Nature, Food, History, Adventure). Returns paginated list of guide summaries.

language.description: Filter by spoken language. Use ZH for Chinese-speaking guides.

is_verified.description: Set true to show only background-checked verified guides

min_price.description: Minimum price per day in USD

max_price.description: Maximum price per day in USD

tools.returns: Paginated list of guides with id, name, languages, specialties, location, price_per_day_usd, price_per_hour_usd, is_verified, rating_average

tools.name: get_guide_detail
tools.description: Get the full profile of a specific tour guide including bio, experience, certifications, photo gallery, and reviews from verified past bookings. Use when the user wants to learn more about a particular guide.
tools.returns: Full guide profile with bio, experience_years, certifications, gallery_image_urls, status (ACTIVE | INACTIVE | SUSPENDED)

tools.name: check_guide_availability
tools.description: Check if a specific guide is available for the requested date range and get a price estimate (daily rate × number of days). Always call this before creating a guide booking.

start_date.description: Start date of the desired booking (YYYY-MM-DD)

end_date.description: End date of the desired booking (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.returns: is_available (boolean), price_estimate_usd, days count, conflicting_bookings array

tools.name: create_guide_booking
tools.description: Create a tour guide booking with a 15-minute hold. Use after confirming availability and user consent. The booking enters HOLD status until payment is completed. Guide contact details are revealed 24 hours before the start date.

linked_trip_booking_id.description: Optional: link to an existing trip booking

special_requests.description: Special requests such as dietary needs, accessibility requirements, or specific interests (max 1000 chars)

tools.returns: Booking object with id, reference (e.g. GDE-ABC123), guide_name, dates, days, status (HOLD), total_price_usd, hold_expires_at

tools.name: get_guide_booking
tools.description: Get details of a specific guide booking. Guide contact info is revealed 24 hours before the start date.
tools.returns: Full booking details with status (HOLD | PENDING_PAYMENT | CONFIRMED | CANCELLED | EXPIRED)

tools.name: cancel_guide_booking
tools.description: Cancel a guide booking. Refund depends on cancellation policy and timing relative to start date. Returns refund amount and percentage. Use only when user explicitly requests cancellation.
